title: Atomic War Bride
writer: Cesare Zavattini, Aldo Paladini, Virgilio Tosi
actors: Antun Vrdoljak, Ewa Krzyzewska, Ljubisa Jovanovic
plot: At a church in the country, eternally optimistic John marries Maria, his Atomic War Bride, as a war starts, planes buzz overhead and bombs start dropping. Though John is "mobilized" by the military seconds after the ceremony, he a...
